description: Performs single sample GSEA. NOTE\: with the release of v10.0.1, this module was renamed from "ssGSEAProjection" to just "ssGSEA". For single-cell data, use the Single.Cell.ssGSEA module instead.
author: GenePattern
plan: ## ssGSEA GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan ### 1. Overview ssGSEA is a GenePattern module that Performs single sample GSEA. NOTE\: with the release of v10.0.1, this module was renamed from "ssGSEAProjection" to just "ssGSEA". For single-cell data, use the Single.Cell.ssGSEA module instead. ### 2. Parameters The module exposes 9 parameters: - Required: input.gct.file, gene.sets.database.files, gene.symbol.column, gene.set.selection, sample.normalization.method, weighting.exponent, min.gene.set.size, combine.mode - Optional: output.file.prefix ### 3. Command Line ``` Rscript ssGSEA.R -l -i -o -D -c -s -n -w -v -C ``` ### 4. Docker Image Docker image: genepattern/docker-r-3-2\:0.1 ### 5. Validation Strategy - Validate all required parameters are provided - Validate file formats match expected extensions - Check parameter value ranges where applicable ### 6. Implementation Roadmap Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation Phase 2: Docker container setup Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.gct.file
parameters.description: Input gct file.  This module does not allow missing values.

parameters.name: output.file.prefix
parameters.description: Output filename prefix.  If unspecified, is set to <prefix of input.gct.file>.PROJ.

parameters.name: gene.sets.database.files
parameters.description: Gene sets database from GSEA website.  Upload a gene set if your gene set is not listed as a choice from MsigDB.

parameters.name: gene.symbol.column
parameters.description: Specifies the gct data column containing gene symbols.  In most cases this will be "Column 1".

parameters.name: gene.set.selection
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of gene set names on which to project expression data. Set to "ALL" if projecting to all defined gene sets.

parameters.name: sample.normalization.method
parameters.description: Method used to normalize gene expression data

parameters.name: weighting.exponent
parameters.description: Module authors strongly recommend against changing from default.

parameters.name: min.gene.set.size
parameters.description: Gene sets with overlap smaller than this are excluded from the analysis.

parameters.name: combine.mode
parameters.description: Options for combining enrichment scores for paired *_UP and *_DN gene sets
